module.name: prompt
module.purpose: Owns prompt templates used by model-facing steps, including raw strict JSON response requirements, no-Markdown-fence output constraints, single-string execution invocation input guidance, a flat Plan shape whose run_steps are concrete tool calls given as { tool: { name, description, input } } and whose pending_steps carry only an intent, and answer-only Initial and Analysis JSON for requests that are already answerable.

childModules.name: step
childModules.purpose: Owns step model prompt templates for Initial and Analysis; both emit a flat Plan shape with concrete { tool: { name, description, input } } run_steps and { intent }-only pending_steps, or an answer-only JSON object, as raw strict JSON without Markdown fences.
